title: Gamebirds: decision to issue the GL43 gamebird general licence for 2025 to 2027
body: "Defra’s GL43 gamebird general licence allows an authorised person to release common pheasants or red-legged partridges on special areas of conservation (SACs) or within 500m of their boundary (their buffer zones).    These documents explain how Defra considered the evidence and came to the decision to issue GL43 for 2025 to 2027.  "
